title: Toronto, ON — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Toronto, ON: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Toronto is a city in ON with a population of 2,794,356. Canada’s largest and most diverse city, a global finance and tech hub with world-class dining — but housing costs are among the nation’s highest.

Last updated: July 10, 2026
